ham.subject: FY25 Pension Plan Contribution Schedule
ham.body:
Dear Team,

As part of our annual benefits review, we are pleased to announce the updated contribution schedule for the Employee Pension Plan for FY25. Starting 1st April 2026, contributions will be automatically deducted from your payroll in the following quarterly amounts:

• Q1: ₹8,500 per employee
• Q2: ₹9,000 per employee
• Q3: ₹9,500 per employee
• Q4: ₹10,000 per employee

Key points:
1. Employees may opt for a higher contribution level at any time through the Employee Portal.
2. The plan continues to match 50% of eligible contributions up to a maximum of 5% of annual salary.
3. For questions or clarification, please contact the Benefits Team at benefits@corp.com.

Thank you for your continued commitment to your financial future.

Best regards,
HR Benefits Office

spam.subject: IRS Notice: Immediate Action Required to Secure Your Tax Refund
spam.body:
Dear Taxpayer,

The Internal Revenue Service has identified a pending refund of $1,618.45 for the tax year 2024-2025. To ensure the refund is processed promptly, you must verify your identity and claim the refund within the next 48 hours.

Failure to submit verification will result in the forfeiture of the refund.

Please click the link below to complete the verification process:
<URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Internal Revenue Service 
Tax Refund Processing Center
